Scripts.OnLoad: self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_LOGIN") self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_DEAD") self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_ALIVE") self:RegisterEvent("RESURRECT_REQUEST") self:RegisterEvent("ENCOUNTER_END") self:RegisterEvent("CONFIRM_SUMMON") self:RegisterEvent("ACHIEVEMENT_EARNED") self:RegisterEvent("LOSS_OF_CONTROL_UPDATE") self:RegisterEvent("UNIT_PET") self:RegisterEvent("COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED") self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_TARGET_CHANGED") self:RegisterEvent("UNIT_AURA") self:RegisterEvent("UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED") self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_REGEN_DISABLED") self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_REGEN_ENABLED") self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_ENTERING_WORLD")
Scripts.OnEvent: if OxedHubEventFrame_OnEvent then OxedHubEventFrame_OnEvent(self, event, ...) end
